# Version 4.148.0
> **New minor release** · Released June 22, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.148.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.148.0)
> **Supersedes [4.147.0](4.147.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.148.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.148.0 ships 42 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

- **Public API surface changed** — The linked API-diff report for 4.148.0 lists the removed and modified members. Review it before upgrading and update any call sites flagged there.

## Engine

- **SkiaSharp to Skia milestone 132** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3560](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3560))
- **Skia to milestone 133** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3660](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3660))
- **Skia to milestone 147** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3702](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3702))

- **Externals/skia to include sk_fontmgr_legacy_create_typeface** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3744](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3744))
- **Libjpeg-turbo to 3.1.4.1** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4012](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4012))
- **Harfbuzz to 14.2.0** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4035](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4035))
- **Merge upstream chrome/m147 bug fixes** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4044](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4044))
- **Skia submodule to disable unused dependency manifests** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4054](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4054))
- **Expat to 2.8.1** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4079](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4079))
- **Merge upstream chrome/m147 bug fixes** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4081](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4081))
- **To Skia milestone m148** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4125](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4125))

## API Surface

- **SKSamplingOptions support to SKSurface.Draw and SKCanvas.DrawSurface** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3491](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3491))
- **Color font palette support and improve variable font robustness** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3742](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3742))
- **Animated WebP encoding support (SKWebpEncoder)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3771](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3771))
- **SKStream.GetData() for zero-copy stream-to-data conversion** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3772](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3772))
- **Content-based build caching with ADO Cache@2** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3826](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3826))
- **HBColor struct for proper hb_color_t representation** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4000](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4000))
- **Missing API wrappers and fix naming convention violations** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4001](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4001))
- **Obsolete remaining legacy paint state-reading APIs** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4114](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4114))

## Bug Fixes

- **#3693: move default-typeface resolution to the managed layer** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3730](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3730))
- **Devcontainers: split into managed and native configs** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3745](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3745))
- **TreatWarningsAsErrors in binding/ and fix all warnings** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3752](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3752))
- **Skottie package downgrade NU1605 in Uno gallery** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3785](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3785))
- **CI: samples, Docker, NanoServer, coverlet, and build chain** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3835](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3835))
- **ANGLE WinAppSDK download failure on 1ES agents** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4014](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4014))
- **.NET SDK version to 10.0.108** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4055](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4055))
- **Promote SKPaint text/font obsolete members to error** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4068](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4068))
- **SKPixmap.GetPixelSpan<T>(x,y) offset using Height instead of Width** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4128](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4128))
- **SKPixmap/SKBitmap GetPixelSpan to use RowBytes for stride** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4148](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4148))
- **Promote remaining pre-v4 obsoletes to error and trim obsolete enums from the ref assembly (#4195)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4205](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4205))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Finalizer crash in SKPath when SKPathBuilder is collected first** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3796](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3796))
- **Rework the lifecycle of singleton instances** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4080](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4080))

- **SKGLView not rendering after tab switch in MAUI TabBar** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@SimonvBez](https://github.com/SimonvBez) ([#3076](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3076))

- **Split Tizen native CI into per-architecture jobs** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3672](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3672))
- **Apple platform TFMs: use 26.0 for libraries, unversioned for apps** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3798](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3798))
- **Drop native builds for pre-.NET 8 Emscripten versions** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4022](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4022))
- **Migrate Linux Docker builds to .NET official cross-compilation images** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4062](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4062))
- **WinUI Projection DLL not found for .NET 9 consumers** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4084](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4084))
